Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / performance optimization

## Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please check that you have completed the following:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (e.g. `README.md`, comments, CLI guide)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or lint issues (`make lint` runs clean)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with `make test`
- [ ] Security and vulnerability checks pass locally with `make sec` and `make vuln-check`
- [ ] (If applicable) Integration tests pass locally with `APPLECONTAINER_INTEGRATION=1 go test -tags integration -v ./examples/...`
